Mona Malik is a dedicated expert who holds a Holofield Inspector Certificate, signifying her adherence to industry standards. With invaluable mentorship from Elyse Fontaine during her doctoral studies, she developed a solid foundation for her career. Funding from the Sapphire Nova Collective has underpinned her research efforts, allowing her pursuit of important projects.
